description: Generate mpoints within the specified range. Both the domain (see domain extent ) and mpoint node spacing (see mpoint node spacing ) must have previously been specified. The resolution specifies the number of mpoints to generate per node spacing in each cardinal direction; the mpoint volume is set consistently with the node spacing and resolution.

keywords.name: slot
keywords.description: Add group name s to newly created mpoints. Use of the group logic is described in Groups . Assign the group to the slot named s . If not supplied, a group name created by the command is assigned to the named Default .

keywords.name: resolution
keywords.description: Specify the number of material points per node spacing. By default i = 2.
